goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'leave after 09:15'.
The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should leave after 09:15
The train should depart from stevenage and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get attraction type and postcode
